CREATE TABLE test_icusort (input_string VARCHAR, locale VARCHAR);
SELECT input_string, icu_sort_key(input_string, locale) AS sort_key FROM test_icusort ORDER BY sort_key;

SELECT a.input_string, b.input_string, icu_sort_key(a.input_string, a.locale) AS sort_key_a, icu_sort_key(b.input_string, b.locale) AS sort_key_b FROM test_icusort a JOIN test_icusort b ON a.locale = b.locale WHERE a.input_string < b.input_string ORDER BY sort_key_a, sort_key_b;
WITH sorted_strings AS (SELECT input_string, icu_sort_key(input_string, locale) AS sort_key FROM test_icusort) SELECT * FROM sorted_strings ORDER BY sort_key;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (input_string VARCHAR, locale VARCHAR);
SELECT icu_sort_key(a.input_string, a.locale) AS key1, icu_sort_key(b.input_string, b.locale) AS key2 FROM test_icusort a CROSS JOIN additional_data b;
SELECT input_string FROM test_icusort WHERE icu_sort_key(input_string, locale) = icu_sort_key('ö', 'DE');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_icusort WHERE icu_sort_key(input_string, locale) IS NOT NULL;
